summary: The named fixes are mostly present, but terminal revoke is still not fully enforced under races in the reviewed bridge scope.

findings.title: Connect can accept a pairing after a revoke wins the registration race
findings.recommendation: After registerPairing returns, reject and close if the stored row has revokedAt set, or make registerPairing fail atomically on revoked rows so the precheck and write cannot admit a newly revoked pairing.

findings.title: Inbound delegation frames are processed without rechecking that the sending pairing is still live and unrevoked
findings.recommendation: Before resolving delegation_result, denial, or ledger_row, confirm the socket pairing is still the current live connection and that its durable row is not revoked; drop frames that arrive after revoke or replacement.
